commit_message:
fix(gemm): explicit width-safe tile math in gemm_engine fix(gemm): explicit width-safe tile math in gemm_engine ## Summary
This PR cleans up width intent in `rtl/gemm/gemm_engine.sv` by introducing explicitly sized intermediates and casts for tile/count math.

### What changed
- Added explicit width localparams for tile counters and tile sizes (`TILE_COUNT_W`, `TILE_SIZE_W`).
- Added explicitly-sized intermediates for tile count math (`dim_*_ext`, `array_size_ext`).
- Replaced unsized `- 1` tile
